title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas Real Estate Partner Abhilash Pillai resigns to join Trilegal
description: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas Real Estate Partner Abhilash Pillai has resigned from the firm and is set to join Trilegal.We have reached out to Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas and Trilegal for comment.Pillai is a 2004 graduate of Government Law College, Trivandrum.Pillai has over two decades of experience advising on complex real estate transactions across India, which include work spanning acquisitions, joint ventures, development, monetisation, title diligence, and regulatory compliance, with a focus on
